summary: Dan Shapiro shares a deal on a Sjoberg workbench found by a reader named Brian. The post highlights a $299 shipped price from Woodworker's Source, compared to $499+ at Rockler. It includes a correction noting the bench is the JPB-4 model rather than the DUO, with fixed vises. The post is a straightforward product recommendation from an early blogging era.
key_points: A Sjoberg JPB-4 workbench is available for $299 shipped, significantly below the $500+ typical price
The post corrects an initial misidentification of the bench model, showing community feedback in action
Shapiro recommends having freight held at the terminal to avoid shipping damage
money_quotes: The second thing I did was rush over to share it with our wonderful readers. First thing I did was to make sure I got mine at this price.
No that wasn't a typo the $299 gets it shipped to your door!!
key_insight: An early blog post sharing a woodworking deal that reflects Shapiro's long-standing maker culture roots, well before his later ventures in tech and laser cutting.
